global_vibe: Serious, data-dense, trustworthy, operational, clear. Built for high-volume scanning, data entry, and status tracking in a warehouse environment.

rules: Use Chivo for all dashboard widget titles and page headers.
Use IBM Plex Sans for tables, forms, and general UI.
CRITICAL: ALWAYS use JetBrains Mono for SKUs, ASINs, EANs, FNSKUs, and tracking numbers to avoid character confusion (like 1 vs I, 0 vs O).
Do not center text inside tables or data-heavy views. Left-align text, right-align numbers/currencies.

navigation.admin: Fixed dark sidebar (w-64) with high contrast. Ensures distinct 'staff' environment.
navigation.client: Top navigation or light sidebar. Must visually distinguish the client area from the admin area to prevent confusion.

cards.style: Flat card design with 1px solid border (#E2E8F0), white background, zero shadow by default. On hover: shadow-sm.

layout.data_density: High. Use compact table rows (py-2 or py-3) to fit maximum SKUs on screen without scrolling.

tables.style: Shadcn Table. Sticky headers. EAN/FNSKU columns must use mono font. Include a thumbnail column for product photos.
tables.actions: Use dropdown menus (Shadcn) at the end of rows for actions (Print Label, Edit, Change Status).

badges.style: Pill shape (rounded-full), solid pale background, bold dark text, 1px border. MUST map exactly to the 'statuses' color palette.

forms.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs. 1px solid border, subtle focus ring (ring-2 ring-blue-500/20 border-blue-500). Left aligned labels.
forms.file_upload: Drag and drop zone for Excel/CSV imports and PDF labels. Must show clear success/error states.

icons.style: Regular weight for dense UI, Duotone for dashboard summary cards.

interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (bg-slate-50) on table rows. Action buttons should darken on hover.
interactions.focus: High contrast blue outline on all inputs for accessibility and fast keyboard navigation.
interactions.transitions: Keep animations very minimal (150ms ease). The system must feel instantaneous.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, row actions, tabs, file uploaders) MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button'.

images.description: Clean, empty modern warehouse interior. Use as a subtle, darkened background (with overlay) for the login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Build Shadcn tables with high data density. Ensure all SKU/EAN/FNSKU fields use JetBrains Mono (font-mono class) for precise readability.
Implement the 5 strict color-coded statuses defined in colors.statuses across the entire application (Dashboards, Tables, Box details).
Client UI vs Admin UI: Ensure they share the design system but have distinct layouts (e.g., dark sidebar for Admin, top-nav for Client) so context is immediately obvious.
Make sure file uploaders for the 'Amazon/UPS PDF labels' show a preview or clear filename upon successful selection.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the dashboard layout (Control Room Grid).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
For the FNSKU generator, implement a layout that explicitly supports the required 50x30mm PDF output format.
